CRITICAL: You MUST always follow these rules.
IMPORTANT: You SHOULD never skip tests.
REQUIRED: You MUST use gofmt.
WARNING: You MUST ALWAYS check for errors.

Always use tabs for indentation.
Use snake_case for variable naming convention.
Sort imports alphabetically.
Line length must not exceed 120 characters.

```go
func example1() {
    fmt.Println("hello")
}
```

```go
func example2() {
    fmt.Println("world")
}
```

```go
func example3() {
    return nil
}
```

```go
func example4() {
    return err
}
```
